session.user:
In each of these files, rename all occurrences of `plan_backend` to `pr_backend`, and rename `require_plan_backend` to `require_pr_backend` wherever it appears:
1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/track_learn_result.py` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_plan_header.py` 3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_pr_description.py` 4. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/set_pr_description.py`
This includes: - Imports - Parameter names - Variable names and attribute accesses - Type annotations - Comments
DO NOT rename: - External API field names - User-facing string messages
Read each file first, then apply all renames using the Edit tool.
session.assistant: I'll help you rename `plan_backend` to `pr_backend` and `require_plan_backend` to `require_pr_backend` across these four files. Let me start by reading each file to understand their current structure.
session.tool_result:
1→"""Track learn workflow result on a plan. 2→ 3→This exec script updates the plan-header metadata block to record the result 4→of a learn workflow. It sets the learn_status field and optionally records 5→the learn_plan_issue if a plan was created. 6→ 7→Usage: 8→ erk exec track-learn-result --plan-id 123 --status completed_no_plan 9→ erk exec track-learn-result --plan-id 123 --status completed_with_plan --learn-pr 456 10→ 11→Output: 12→ JSON object with tracking result: 13→ { 14→ "success": true, 15→ "pr_number": "123", 16→ "learn_status": "completed_no_plan" 17→ } 18→ 19→Exit Codes: 20→ 0: Success 21→ 1: Error (invalid issue, GitHub failure, validation error, etc.) 22→""" 23→ 24→import json 25→from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass 26→ 27→import click 28→ 29→from erk_shared.context.helpers import require_plan_backend, require_repo_root 30→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.schemas import LearnStatusValue
... [161 lines omitted] ...
31→from erk_shared.pr_store.types import PlanHeaderNotFoundError 46→class TrackLearnResultError: 47→ """Error result when tracking fails.""" 50→ error: str 62→def _status_validation_error(*, error_code: str, message: str) -> None: 63→ """Emit a status validation error as JSON and exit.""" 64→ error = TrackLearnResultError(success=False, error=error_code, message=message) 65→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error))) 109→ _status_validation_error( 110→ error_code="missing-learn-pr", 116→ _status_validation_error( 117→ error_code="unexpected-learn-pr", 123→ _status_validation_error( 124→ error_code="missing-plan-pr", 130→ _status_validation_error( 131→ error_code="unexpected-learn-pr", 137→ _status_validation_error( 138→ error_code="unexpected-plan-pr", 160→ except PlanHeaderNotFoundError: 161→ error = TrackLearnResultError( 163→ error="no-metadata-block", 166→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error)), err=True) 168→ except RuntimeError as e: 169→ error = TrackLearnResultError( 171→ error="github-api-failed", 172→ message=f"Failed to update learn status on PR {pr_id}: {e}", 174→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error)), err=True)

1→"""Update plan-header metadata fields generically. 2→ 3→Usage: 4→ erk exec update-plan-header <pr_id> key1=value1 key2=value2 ... 5→ 6→Output: 7→ JSON with success status, pr_id, and fields_updated 8→ 9→Exit Codes: 10→ 0: Success 11→ 1: Error (PR not found, no fields provided, invalid field format, 12→ schema validation failure, no plan-header block) 13→""" 14→ 15→import json 16→from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass 17→from typing import NoReturn 18→ 19→import click 20→ 21→from erk_shared.context.helpers import require_plan_backend, require_repo_root 22→from erk_shared.pr_store.types import PlanHeaderNotFoundError 23→ 24→ 25→@dataclass(frozen=True) 26→class UpdateSuccess: 27→ """Success response for plan-header update.""" 28→ 29→ success: bool 30→ pr_id: str
... [122 lines omitted] ...
35→class UpdateError: 36→ """Error response for plan-header update.""" 39→ error: str 43→def _fail(*, error: str, message: str) -> NoReturn: 44→ """Emit a JSON error to stderr and exit with code 1.""" 45→ payload = UpdateError(success=False, error=error, message=message) 84→ ValueError: If any field lacks an '=' separator. 89→ raise ValueError(msg) 116→ error="no_fields", 123→ except ValueError as e: 124→ _fail(error="invalid_field_format", message=str(e)) 131→ except PlanHeaderNotFoundError: 133→ error="no_plan_header", 136→ except RuntimeError as e: 137→ _fail(error="update_failed", message=f"Failed to update plan header: {e}") 138→ except ValueError as e: 139→ _fail(error="schema_validation_failed", message=f"Schema validation failed: {e}")

1→"""Update PR title and body using AI-generated description. 2→ 3→This exec command generates an AI-powered PR title and body from the full diff 4→between the current branch and its parent, then updates the PR on GitHub. 5→ 6→Unlike `erk pr submit`, this does NOT amend the local commit or push changes. 7→It only updates the PR's title and body, preserving existing header and footer 8→metadata. 9→ 10→Usage: 11→ erk exec update-pr-description 12→ erk exec update-pr-description --session-id "abc123" 13→ 14→Exit Codes: 15→ 0: Success 16→ 1: Error (no PR, Claude unavailable, diff extraction failure) 17→""" 18→ 19→import uuid 20→from pathlib import Path 21→ 22→import click 23→ 24→from erk.cli.commands.pr.shared import ( 25→ assemble_pr_body, 26→ cleanup_diff_file, 27→ discover_branch_context, 28→ echo_plan_context_status, 29→ require_claude_available, 30→ run_commit_message_generation,
... [147 lines omitted] ...
75→ raise click.ClickException( 99→ raise click.ClickException("Failed to extract diff for AI analysis") 110→ raise click.ClickException("Repository has no GitHub remote configured") 139→ raise click.ClickException(f"Failed to generate message: {msg_result.error_message}")

1→"""Set PR title and body from agent-provided values. 2→ 3→Takes --title and --body (or --body-file) and updates the PR on GitHub, 4→preserving existing header, footer, and metadata. This command does NOT 5→call Claude — it applies values already generated by the calling agent. 6→ 7→Usage: 8→ erk exec set-pr-description --title "Fix auth bug" --body "Fixes the auth issue..." 9→ erk exec set-pr-description --title "Fix auth bug" --body-file /tmp/body.md 10→ 11→Exit Codes: 12→ 0: Success 13→ 1: Error (no PR, linkage mismatch) 14→""" 15→ 16→from pathlib import Path 17→ 18→import click 19→ 20→from erk.cli.commands.pr.shared import ( 21→ assemble_pr_body, 22→ discover_branch_context, 23→) 24→from erk.cli.repo_resolution import get_remote_github 25→from erk.core.pr_context_provider import PrContextProvider 26→from erk_shared.context.helpers import require_context 27→from erk_shared.context.types import NoRepoSentinel 28→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import BodyText, PRNotFound 29→ 30→
... [78 lines omitted] ...
65→ raise click.ClickException( 78→ raise click.ClickException("Repository has no GitHub remote configured")

tool_use.name: Edit
tool_use.param: # Get dependencies from context backend = require_plan_backend(ctx) repo_root = require_repo_root(ctx)
# Get dependencies from context backend = require_pr_backend(ctx) repo_root = require_repo_root(ctx)

tool_use.name: Edit
tool_use.param: # Plan context for <details> section plan_provider = PrContextProvider( plan_backend=erk_ctx.plan_backend, remote_github=get_remote_github(erk_ctx) )

Excellent! All renames have been successfully applied. Let me create a summary of the changes:
## Summary
I've successfully renamed `plan_backend` to `pr_backend` and `require_plan_backend` to `require_pr_backend` across all four files:
### 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/track_learn_result.py` - **Line 29**: `require_plan_backend` → `require_pr_backend` (import) - **Line 143**: `require_plan_backend(ctx)` → `require_pr_backend(ctx)` (function call)
### 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_plan_header.py` - **Line 21**: `require_plan_backend` → `require_pr_backend` (import) - **Line 126**: `require_plan_backend(ctx)` → `require_pr_backend(ctx)` (function call)
### 3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_pr_description.py` - **Line 107**: `plan_backend=ctx.plan_backend` → `plan_backend=ctx.pr_backend` (attribute access)
### 4. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/set_pr_description.py` - **Line 75**: `plan_backend=erk_ctx.plan_backend` → `plan_backend=erk_ctx.pr_backend` (attribute access)
All changes include imports, parameter names, variable names, attribute accesses, and type annotations while preserving user-facing string messages and external API field names.
